name: Open Intent Layer
description: Open Intent Layer's canonical intent classification taxonomy for AI authority across digital operations and physical processes. Covers 29 domains with sub-categories for precise intent routing, risk assessment, regulatory mapping, and safety-rated decision evidence. Domains OIL-100 through OIL-1400 cover digital enterprise operations; OIL-1500 through OIL-2900 cover embodied / physical AI processes.
